limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

search.description: Optional. Match against dashboard `name`, `description`, and tag names. Returns case-insensitive substring matches and fuzzy trigram matches (typos, transpositions, prefix-as-you-type) together, ordered exact-first, then pinned status, then name; each result's `search_match_type` is `exact` or `similar`. When omitted, dashboards are ordered by pinned status then alphabetical name. Capped at 200 characters; longer queries return a 400 error.
